results.title: AI Answer
results.snippet: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard for secure connections between AI tools and data sources. It was introduced by Anthropic to facilitate standardized interactions. It's designed to enhance the security and efficiency of AI applications.

results.title: Introducing the Model Context Protocol - Anthropic
results.snippet: The Model Context Protocol is an open standard that enables developers to build secure, two-way connections between their data sources and AI-powered tools.
